meta.title: What will you learn in the AI for Good Specialization?
meta.description:
AI plays a significant role in addressing critical issues such as climate change and public health, and you can position your own projects within this realm!

Join DeepLearning.AI’s AI for Good specialization and embark on creating AI applications that address significant global challenges.

Enroll today: https://bit.ly/3AZ47I4

#AI #AIforGood #disasterresponse #machinelearning
